headline: Is Assurant (AIZ) Pricing Reflect Its Strong Excess Returns And Recent Share Performance
summary: If you are wondering whether Assurant's current share price really lines up with its underlying worth, you are not alone. This article is designed to help you unpack that question. Assurant recently closed at US$227.18, with a 1% decline over the last week, a 5.8% decline over the last month, a 4.4% decline year to date, but a 14.6% gain over 1 year, 99.2% over 3 years and 81.3% over 5 years. These figures give important context for any discussion of value and risk. Recent coverage around...
